title: pilosella stoloniflora
intro: Pilosella stolonifera, also known as Creeping Saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant in the Saxifragaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems and inflammation. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Pilosella stolonifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
